tools.name: list_qr_types
tools.description: Lists all available QR code types supported by this app: WiFi, vCard contacts, URLs, calendar events, email, phone, and text. Returns each type with a description and use case.

tools.name: get_qr_type_fields
tools.description: Returns the required and optional input fields for a specific QR code type. Accepts a type parameter (wifi, vcard, url, event, text, email, or phone) and returns field names, types, and descriptions.

tools.name: generate_qr_code
tools.description: Generates a QR code from the provided type and content fields. Supports WiFi, vCard, URL, event, email, phone, and text types. Returns a widget with live preview where the user can customize colors, dot patterns, corner styles, frames, and logos, then download as PNG or SVG.
